Reproducibility: Do we have a high-confidence way to reproduce the issue? Source inspection gives a clear reproduction path through installing or inspecting the current wacli formula and checking `brew list --versions wacli`; I did not rerun Homebrew locally in this read-only review.

target.title: fix: declare wacli formula version
target.body:
## Summary

- Declare `version "0.11.0"` in the `wacli` Homebrew formula.
- Prevent Homebrew from inferring the package version as `64` from the `darwin_arm64` artifact name.

## Validation

- `brew audit --formula wacli`
- `brew test wacli`
- `brew linkage --test wacli`
- `brew list --versions wacli` -> `wacli 0.11.0`
- `wacli --version` -> `wacli 0.11.0`

## Notes

Direct push to `openclaw/homebrew-tap` was denied for `Hashinai`, so this PR is opened from the fork branch `Hashinai:fix/wacli-formula-version`.
target.author: hashinai
